_comment: Example configurations for character selection backgrounds

example_1_same_background.title: The Goblin Ambush
example_1_same_background.comment: When character_selection_background is not specified, it uses login_background

example_2_different_backgrounds.title: The Goblin Ambush
example_2_different_backgrounds.comment: Different backgrounds for login vs character selection

example_3_custom_backgrounds.title: Dragon's Lair Campaign
example_3_custom_backgrounds.comment: Completely custom backgrounds for immersive experience

implementation_notes.fallback_behavior: If character_selection_background is not defined, login_background is used
implementation_notes.image_location: All background images should be placed in templates/assets/ directory
implementation_notes.recommended_size: 1920x1080 or higher for best quality on all devices
